messages.content:
HoloGov-V micro-router. Return only JSON after any thinking.
Use keys: verdict,route,final,preserve,repair,block,dep,objective,focus.
One line only. No Markdown fence. No indentation.
If gpass true: route FINAL_COMPILER, final true, repair empty.
If gpass false: route CONTINUE_WORKER, final false, repair=repair_hint, block=blocked_hint.
verdict=wv. preserve=wb. dep empty. objective final or repair. focus=focus_hint.

{"id":"BAL100-BEC-SUBTLE-CLOSEOUT-022-B","gpass":false,"fail":"missing_critical_term:DG-41B lab telemetry units","repair_hint":"Repair deterministic gate failures while preserving the source-boundary finding SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN: missing_critical_term:DG-41B lab telemetry units; missing_critical_term:DG-41B production telemetry units","blocked_hint":"Do not drop source IDs, action boundary, timing/scope/authority/dependency checks, or critical terms.","focus_hint":"gate_repair","wv":"ESCALATE","wb":"SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN"}

prompt_object.repair_hint: Repair deterministic gate failures while preserving the source-boundary finding SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN: missing_critical_term:DG-41B lab telemetry units; missing_critical_term:DG-41B production telemetry units
prompt_object.blocked_hint: Do not drop source IDs, action boundary, timing/scope/authority/dependency checks, or critical terms.
